mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_medical_template WHERE deleted = 0
AND (template_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR template_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR diagnosis LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT id, template_code, template_type, name, permission, diagnosis, description, content, creator, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_medical_template WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_medical_template (template_code, template_type, name, permission, diagnosis, description, content, creator, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{templateCode}, #{templateType}, #{name}, #{permission}, #{diagnosis}, #{description}, #{content}, #{creator}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE clinic_medical_template
template_code = #{templateCode}, template_type = #{templateType}, name = #{name}, permission = #{permission}, diagnosis = #{diagnosis}, description = #{description}, content = #{content}, creator = #{creator}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
